brief_en: Quiet day across frontier labs on 2026-07-19 (UTC+8). No major model releases, product launches, or executive announcements from primary official channels in the last 12 hours. Ongoing rollouts from earlier in the week continue.
brief_zh: 2026-07-19（UTC+8）前線AI大廠動態平靜。過去12小時內，主要官方頻道無重大模型發布、產品推出或高管公告。本週早些時候的 rollout 持續進行。
